blockingIssues.description: Convention parsing broken (line 1182): String slice indices incorrect - uses [3..] instead of [4..] for '- **' prefix, causing stored conventions to be unparsable
Confidence calculation bug (line 1125): Uses sum of all pattern frequencies instead of per-pattern frequency, incorrectly inflating confidence scores
Anti-pattern retrieval unimplemented (line 1199): get_anti_patterns_for_error is a stub returning empty vec - anti-patterns are extracted but cannot be retrieved
update() doesn't preserve scoping fields (line 634): UPDATE query omits repository, language, task_type columns - entries lose scoping metadata on update
get_by_type() has no repository filter (line 786): Returns entries from ALL repositories, violating cross-repo isolation
get_by_label() has no repository filter (line 803): Returns entries from ALL repositories, violating cross-repo isolation
MemoryEntry lacks confidence field (traits.rs:196): Feature requires 'confidence <0.3 as deprecated' but MemoryEntry has no confidence field
MemoryEntry lacks superseded_by field (traits.rs:196): Feature requires 'superseded_by link' but field doesn't exist
No integration into memory system: Deprecation module is standalone utility never called by SqliteMemoryStore
decay_rate_for_block_type() will panic (line 96): Should return Option<DecayRate> instead of DecayRate - unknown variants cause runtime panic
BM25 search generates random UUIDs (line 620): Uses Uuid::new_v4() instead of actual entry_id from RecallResult, breaking RRF fusion
search() doesn't filter by source_episode_id (line 725): Field exists in MemoryQuery but is never checked - 'Query memories by provenance' requirement unmet
Claimed tests don't exist (line 809): Handoff claims 4 provenance tests were added but grep finds none
Serialization errors silently dropped (lines 176,203,221,238,257): unwrap_or_default() creates empty {} instead of propagating errors - data loss for error events

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion:
Document the convention block markdown format: '### ConventionType

- **name**: description

  - Example: `code`' - this format is used by pattern_learning and skill_extraction but never documented
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Features memory-pattern-learning and memory-skill-extraction both use this format but it's reverse-engineered from parsing code

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add guidance on when parse() methods should be fallible vs return defaults - enum parsing patterns vary across codebase (some panic, some default, some return Result)
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: mem-semantic-memory uses silent defaults in parse(), memory-confidence-bayesian uses expect(), no consistent pattern documented

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document that MemoryStore trait get_by_type() and get_by_label() are not repository-scoped - this is a pre-existing design gap that workers should be aware of
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: mem-scoping review found get_by_type/get_by_label have no repository parameter despite search() requiring repository

rejectedObservations.observation: Skills stored in '.skills' but project standard is '.swell/skills/'
rejectedObservations.reason: Already documented in memory-skill-extraction review as non-blocking - feature description specifies '.skills' so implementation matches spec

rejectedObservations.observation: Rust skill should be renamed to rust-worker
rejectedObservations.reason: Skill naming is not a blocker - 'Rust' skill exists and workers correctly fall back to it
